items.notes: GNSS positioning chips, modules, antennas, and correction services. Core business; serves automotive, industrial, drone/UAV, and robotics markets.

items.notes: Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and LTE/LPWA cellular modules (e.g. SARA-R5). Significant secondary product line alongside positioning.

evidence.snippet: IPO at the SIX Swiss Exchange

headquarters.notes: About page explicitly states 'With headquarters in Thalwil, Switzerland' (line 92, exceeds 60-word citation cap). Line 129 ('IPO at the SIX Swiss Exchange') confirms Swiss domicile. City of Thalwil confirmed by boilerplate across multiple pages.

evidence.snippet: We operate as a fabless IC and module design-house, utilizing high-volume, state-of-the-art fabrication and packaging [partners](/alliance-memberships-partnerships) that adhere to the highest manufacturing standards.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Fabless IC and module design-house selling GNSS chips, positioning modules, and wireless communication modules that go into drones, automotive, and IoT devices.

products.notes: Many more SKUs exist (ZED-F9K, ZED-F9L, NEO-D9S, MIA-M10, MAX-M10, ZED-X20P, F11 platform); only a subset was fetched. Core families: M9, M10, F9, F10, F11 GNSS platforms plus Bluetooth/Wi-Fi NINA modules and cellular SARA/LARA series.

evidence.snippet: u-blox’s cellular modules with own LPWA chipset pass US certifications and enter production

We operate as a fabless IC and module design-house, utilizing high-volume, state-of-the-art fabrication and packaging [partners](/alliance-memberships-partnerships) that adhere to the highest manufacturing standards.

readiness.notes: Established catalog of GNSS chips, modules, and wireless modules sold globally through distributor network. New platforms (F11, ZED-X20P) launched commercially in 2024-2026.
